title: The Natural Lifecycle of Electronic Products and E-Waste
description: A flowchart illustrating the journey of electronic products from raw material extraction through disposal and the critical natural processes involved in responsible e-waste management.
relationships: Flow from Raw Material Extraction to Manufacturing
Flow from Manufacturing to Consumer Use
Flow from Consumer Use to End-of-Life Disposal
Negative Impact of E-Waste on Nature via Decomposition/Leaching
Negative Impact on Nature via Informal Recycling Pollution
Positive Reintegration with Nature via Formal Recycling and Land Reclamation
